appCorePath.note: packages/app-core/src/services/local-inference/ffi-streaming-backend.ts only enables image inputs when a tier-compatible mmproj path is provided.

memoryImplications.note: Smoke uses a small --ctx-size, so KV cache allocation is much smaller than the tier's long-context runtime budget. Operational RAM still needs text weights + mmproj + KV cache + Metal/CPU working buffers.
